games.reasoning: Angels starting hot at 2-0 while Astros struggling at 0-2. Houston typically slow starters in early season, and Angels' momentum plus better early form suggests value on the road dog.
Brewers at home with solid 1-0 start facing struggling White Sox. Milwaukee's pitching depth and home field advantage make them slight value despite the juice.
Yankees perfect 2-0 start against Giants' 0-2 struggles. New York's superior lineup depth and early season sharpness provides clear edge at reasonable price.
Tigers' 2-0 start shows strong early form while Padres winless at 0-2. Detroit's momentum and solid pitching staff development makes them attractive road underdog value.
Dodgers' perfect 2-0 record at home against winless Diamondbacks creates clear talent and form disparity. LA's rotation depth and offensive firepower justify the heavy favorite status.
